'''Ksift''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] rainforest [[Planet/Legends|world]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. Its [[Capital/Legends|capital]] was [[Rakati]]. It was also the location of [[Alliance Training Center-5/Green Squad|ATC-5/GS]] and a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] security outpost. [[Nik (Rebel)|Nik]] betrayed the local Rebels, but was brought to justice by [[Bret Hanson]].
